An [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Asteroid field|field]] in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]], the '''Pirate's Shadow''' was named for the cover and shelter it provided to [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and thugs lurking within it, preying on [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] that ventured too close. [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] forces sent occasional patrols into the area, but were never able to eliminate the pirate threat or [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operations in the Pirate's Shadow.

==Behind the scenes==
The Pirate's Shadow appeared in the video game ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].

*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
